title: Tony Cletus - Builder, Applied AI & Full-Stack Developer
about_text:
I am **Tony Cletus**, a Builder deeply grounded in full-stack development, continuous learning, and exploring the unknown.
I am the Founder and Program Manager at **Programmify**, a platform I started to give students the practical, hands-on experience I wished I had when starting out, which has now grown into a space where I build the builders of tomorrow.
Beyond my startup experience, I am perpetually curious. I study AI model infrastructure, explore agentic engineering (regularly working with AI coding agents like Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, Antigravity, Qwen 3 Coder, and Lovable), and constantly research new paradigms of intelligence. I am driven by an unending desire to build, I hate being bored, so I am always tinkering, trying, breaking, and learning.
about_highlight:
My roots are in Africa, and I am deeply passionate about identifying gaps where AI and technology can solve critical problems, even in regions with limited infrastructure. This drives my heavy research focus on projects like **AANI**.
I value family, culture, and writing occasionally. In the past, I worked extensively as a marketer, giving me a unique edge in product growth.
Looking toward the future, my curiosity extends to hardware, robotics, and even the universe and space exploration. I build independently with the hope that my research and creations will one day produce breakthroughs that change humanity, particularly for the Global South.
